zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Tozer於1620年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Thomas Tozier50歲，母親Charity Tabb41歲。他於1656年5月3日與Judith Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1675年10月16日在美國緬因州約克貝維其可享年55歲，埋葬在美國緬因州約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Tozer于1620年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Thomas Tozier50岁，母亲Charity Tabb41岁。他于1656年5月3日与Judith Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1675年10月16日在美国缅因州約克貝維其可享年55岁，埋葬在美国缅因州約克。

nameMeanings.name: Tozer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English tosen ‘to tease, card’ (Old English tāsian), for someone who teased or carded wool, flax, etc., so as to clean and separate the fibres.
Americanized form of Hungarian Tőzsér: occupational name for a dealer or tradesman, tőzsér, especially one selling cattle.

variants.name: Tozier
meanings: English: variant of   Tozer  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Tozer was born in 1620, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Tozier, was 50 and his mother, Charity Tabb, was 41. He married Judith Smith on 3 May 1656, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 October 1675, in Berwick, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 55, and was buried in York, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Tozer est né en 1620, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Tozier, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Charity Tabb, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Judith Smith le 3 mai 1656, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1675, à Berwick, York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à York, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Tozer 1620 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Tozier 50 und seine Mutter Charity Tabb 41. Er hat am 3. Mai 1656 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Judith Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1675 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Berwick, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Tozer è nato il nel 1620 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Tozier, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Charity Tabb, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Judith Smith il 3 maggio 1656, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1675, nel Berwick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Tozerが1620年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Thomas Tozierは50歳，母Charity Tabbは41歳であった。1656年5月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでJudith Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1675年10月16日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークバーウィックで55歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Tozer(이)가 1620년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Tozier(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Charity Tabb(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1656년 5월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Judith Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1675년 10월 16일 미국 메인 주 요르크 버윅에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Tozer nasceu em 1620, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Tozier, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Charity Tabb, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith Smith em 3 de maio de 1656, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1675, em Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Tozer родился в 1620 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Tozier было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Charity Tabb, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Smith 3 мая 1656 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 октября 1675 г. в местности бирвикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Tozer nació en 1620, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Tozier, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Charity Tabb, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Judith Smith el 3 de mayo de 1656, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1675, en Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en York, Maine, Estados Unidos.
